'''âch-y-j-ch''' ('''kachayjechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:woof|woof]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-y-j-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:woof|woof]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âch-y-j-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kachayjechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichayjechoko|thichayjechoko]] || [[word:jichayjechoko|jichayjechoko]] || [[word:shichayjechoko|shichayjechoko]] || [[word:kichayjechoko|kichayjechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchayjechoko|thuthuchayjechoko]] || [[word:jujuchayjechoko|jujuchayjechoko]] || [[word:shushuchayjechoko|shushuchayjechoko]] || [[word:kukuchayjechoko|kukuchayjechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchayjechoko|thuchayjechoko]] || [[word:juchayjechoko|juchayjechoko]] || [[word:shuchayjechoko|shuchayjechoko]] || [[word:kuchayjechoko|kuchayjechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchayjechoko|thuchayjechoko]] || [[word:juchayjechoko|juchayjechoko]] || [[word:shuchayjechoko|shuchayjechoko]] || [[word:kuchayjechoko|kuchayjechoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochayjechoko|thochayjechoko]] || [[word:jochayjechoko|jochayjechoko]] || [[word:shochayjechoko|shochayjechoko]] || [[word:kochayjechoko|kochayjechoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochayjechoko|thochayjechoko]] || [[word:jochayjechoko|jochayjechoko]] || [[word:shochayjechoko|shochayjechoko]] || [[word:kochayjechoko|kochayjechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠchayjechoko|thĂŠchayjechoko]] || [[word:jĂŠchayjechoko|jĂŠchayjechoko]] || [[word:shĂŠchayjechoko|shĂŠchayjechoko]] || [[word:kĂŠchayjechoko|kĂŠchayjechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachayjechoko|thathachayjechoko]] || [[word:jajachayjechoko|jajachayjechoko]] || [[word:shashachayjechoko|shashachayjechoko]] || [[word:kakachayjechoko|kakachayjechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachayjechoko|thachayjechoko]] || [[word:jachayjechoko|jachayjechoko]] || [[word:shachayjechoko|shachayjechoko]] || [[word:kachayjechoko|kachayjechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachayjechoko|thachayjechoko]] || [[word:jachayjechoko|jachayjechoko]] || [[word:shachayjechoko|shachayjechoko]] || [[word:kachayjechoko|kachayjechoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
